summary: First-time testing of PROCUREMENT app after fresh import. Backend: 33/33 pytest tests passing (auth, transactions CRUD, KPI, master vendors/items, admin/users, store role, finance role, sales-orders, deliveries, logout). Frontend: verified login page, admin login redirects to Dashboard with seeded stats (Rp 16.165.000, 8 transactions, 4 vendors), KPI page renders scorecard (On Time Delivery / Compliance / Completion), Master vendors (9 rows), Master items (9 rows), Admin users (4 seed users), Sales Orders (4 seeded), Deliveries page loads. Store role redirected to /store/stock and prices HIDDEN (no 'Rp'/'Harga' anywhere). Store /store/receive shows pending POs (6 items grouped into 5 POs). Finance role logs in, sees dashboard with prices and KPI. Logout works for all roles. Backend enforces 403 for finance POST /transactions.
action_items: None — app fully functional as imported. Optional: the problem statement mentioned '/input page shows 8 seeded rows' but /input is actually the InputTransactionPage (form to add new transactions), not a listing. Transaction totals are visible on Dashboard. This is a wording mismatch, not a bug.
Optional: browser console emits 401 for GET /api/auth/me on unauthenticated pages (expected — auth provider probes session). Consider silencing in axios interceptor if desired.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1856 lines — long single file. Consider splitting by domain (auth, transactions, store, sales-orders, deliveries) into routers/modules.
require_write blocks only 'finance' — 'store' role can POST /api/transactions. If that's not intended for store role, add explicit admin+staff check. Current design leaves it open.
All endpoints use async/await correctly, MongoDB _id excluded in list handlers, env vars used properly (JWT_SECRET, MONGO_URL, ADMIN_USERNAME/PASSWORD).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewrote from stale email-based auth to current username-based auth; added coverage for all roles, KPI, SO, deliveries)
test_credentials: admin/admin123, staff01/staff123, store01/store123, finance01/finance123 — all working
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed_data.py data (8 transactions, 4 sales orders, 4 users + admin, 6 post_to_store items).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set (or pytest picks it up from /app/frontend/.env if exported). App uses cookie-based JWT — use requests.Session(). Login endpoint expects {username, password} (NOT email). Sales orders model uses 'so_no' and 'customer' fields (not so_number/customer_name). Delivery model requires 'destination' and 'items' array with {item_name, qty, unit}. Finance role gets 403 on write endpoints via require_write dependency. Store role is redirected to /store/stock and price fields are hidden in UI.
